title: PRD Resume Example
subtitle: Avery Example · Product Architect
summary: Manifest-first systems, document tooling, and design systems for portable structured publishing.

children.caption: Resume-specific authored data can still live under `profiles/resume.json`.

children.text: Avery Example builds manifest-first tooling, validation systems, and rendering foundations for portable responsive documents.
Designed format tooling for structured, portable document systems with an emphasis on validator truth, predictable packaging, and profile-based rendering.
Keep the manifest canonical, the content structured, and the viewer honest about what it actually supports.
